welcome.title: Wo nim wo ho
welcome.subtitle: Ɛyɛ dwumadi a ɛboa yɛn ahu adwene ne akwan a nnipa foforo so dwen no mu yɛɛteɛne. [NEEDS_REVIEW: validate natural Twi for ‘research tool for cognitive diversity’]

consent.title: Ɔmanfo dwumadi ho gyinae [NEEDS_REVIEW: consent / research participation title]

results.title: Wo nkomo mu nsem
results.group_insights_hint: Opens aggregate guidance when cohort insights are enabled.

cohortInsights.guidance_tagline: Insight → action · Guidance for human environments—not a clinical report.
cohortInsights.page_intro: Pooled patterns as practical guidance—not diagnosis.
cohortInsights.dynamics_lead: Neutral read on differences that may coexist.
cohortInsights.confidence_tooltip: Probabilistic insights from patterns—not definitive conclusions.
cohortInsights.footer_uncertainty: For conversation and experiments—not a substitute for professional care.

F.title: Ahwehwɛ a ɛyɛ den [NEEDS_REVIEW]
F.low_label: Da so ara wɔ adwene mu [NEEDS_REVIEW: easily distracted]
F.high_label: Tumi a wotumi de ahwehwɛ to baabi ara [NEEDS_REVIEW: deep focus]
F.description: Ɛkyerɛ sɛnea wode ahwehwɛ to dwuma baako so sen sɛnea wobɛsesa bere a ahintasɛm ba. [NEEDS_REVIEW]

P.title: Nhwɛso ne mfonini adwene [NEEDS_REVIEW: pattern processing]
P.low_label: Adwene a ɛyɛ konkrete, akwan so [NEEDS_REVIEW]
P.high_label: Ahunu a ɛwɔ mfonini ne nhyehyɛe mu [NEEDS_REVIEW]
P.description: Ɛkasa ho dwuma a ɛyɛ konkrete ne bere a wohunu nhyehyɛe ne mmara a ɛda adi no ho. [NEEDS_REVIEW]

S.title: Asɛm a ɛfiri honam ne adwene so [NEEDS_REVIEW: sensory sensitivity]
S.description: Kwan a kwan pa, ɔkasa, ne nea wode ka ho dwuma no bɔ wo ahosuo anaa w’adwene. [NEEDS_REVIEW]

E.title: Bɔ a ɛfiri nnipa nkabom mu (Ubuntu: ‘me yɛ ɛnam ɔfoforo so’) [NEEDS_REVIEW: title register]
E.low_label: Nnipa dodoɔ ma me tumi [NEEDS_REVIEW: energised by groups — Ubuntu: shared life gives strength]
E.high_label: Sɛ me ne nnipa tena hɔ a, me kra brɛ [NEEDS_REVIEW: prolonged social contact drains]
E.description: Wɔ Ghana ne Afrika Anaafoɔ mu, nnipa yɛ nkɔsoɔ: yɛte sɛ ‘me yɛ ɛnam ɔfoforo so’ (Ubuntu). Saa dwumadi yi nso hwehwɛ sɛnea wo kra ne nnipa nkabom bɔ: sɛ nnipa ma wo ahoɔden anaa sɛ bere tenten a, w’ahia aduanan bere. Eyi nyɛ sɛ wommɔ obi kwan — ɛyɛ ho adwene a ɛfa honam ne bere ho. [NEEDS_REVIEW]

R.title: Ɔkwan a wopɛ a ɛyɛ hyehyɛ ne bere [NEEDS_REVIEW: structure preference]
R.low_label: Mepɛ sɛ me si akwan so bere a ɛsesa [NEEDS_REVIEW: flexible / improvising]
R.high_label: Mepɛ bere a wɔahyɛ ato mu ne adwuma a ato hɔ [NEEDS_REVIEW: routine and plans]
R.description: Wɔ sunsum mu ne aduanan bere mu, ‘Ghana bere’ ne nkabom dwuma tumi ma adwene pa fifiri ‘bere a wɔde ato hɔ’ ho kɔ ‘bere a Onyankopɔn de ma’ so. Saa nkabom yi bɛtumi ayɛ hyehyɛ a ɛyɛ mmerɛwae sen klɔk nko ara. Saa dwumadi yi bisae sɛnea wopɛ hyehyɛ a ɛda adi sen sɛnea wogye tom kwan a ɛsesa. [NEEDS_REVIEW]

C.title: Adwene a ɛtumi sesa [NEEDS_REVIEW: cognitive flexibility]
C.high_label: Metumi ne nea ɛnyɛ daadaa ne nsesa di nkɔmmɔ [NEEDS_REVIEW]
C.description: Sɛnea wotumi sesa w’adwene bere a nsɛm nni mu anaa ɛsesa. [NEEDS_REVIEW]

T.title: Bere ne bere nhwehwɛmu [NEEDS_REVIEW: temporal processing]
T.low_label: Bere tumi ma me nnu hɔ [NEEDS_REVIEW: in-the-moment]
T.high_label: Mete bere anim yiye [NEEDS_REVIEW: precise time sense]
T.description: Sɛnea wote bere anim anaa wode wo ho to bere a ɛrekɔ so no so. [NEEDS_REVIEW]

I.title: Nimdeɛ a ɛfiri honam mu [NEEDS_REVIEW: interoceptive]
I.low_label: Nimdeɛ a ɛfiri honam mu no ketewa [NEEDS_REVIEW]
I.high_label: Nimdeɛ a ɛfiri honam mu no den [NEEDS_REVIEW]
I.description: Sɛnea wuhu sɛnea wo honam te — akoma, akɔn, brɛ. [NEEDS_REVIEW]

A.title: Adwene a ɛde nsem bom [NEEDS_REVIEW: associative]
A.high_label: Nkabom a ɛtrɛw, adwene pa bebree [NEEDS_REVIEW: divergent]
A.description: Sɛnea ideɛ no bɔ ho anaa ɛte baabi foforo so. [NEEDS_REVIEW]

V.title: Ɔkasae ne mfonini adwene [NEEDS_REVIEW: verbal–visual]
V.high_label: Mfonini ne beae a ɛwɔ honam so [NEEDS_REVIEW: visuo-spatial]
V.description: Sɛnea ɔkasae anaa mfonini di kan wɔ w’adwene mu. [NEEDS_REVIEW]

sms_profile.title: Profile from SMS code
sms_profile.intro: Paste compact code from results page. Approximate deciles; not clinical.
sms_profile.twilio_note: SMS needs Twilio backend — not in this repo.
